name: Hermits
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 minutes Bake Time: 7 to 8 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream the Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, and milk using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended. Add the eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
3. Gradually mix in the flour mixture (salt, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves) into the creamed mixture. Stir in the raisins and chopped walnuts. Using a spoon or cookie scoop, drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 7 to 8 minutes at 400°F. Remove from the oven and transfer to a cooling rack. Sprinkle confectioners sugar over the cooled cookies.
Makes 4 1/2 to 5 dozen 2-inch cookies.
